  "ocr_text_if_useful": "Carrier\n19XL 离心式冷水机组\n19XL Centrifugal Liquid Chiller\n开机、操作及维护说明书\nStart - up, Operation, and Maintenance Instructions\n上海合众－开利空调设备有限公司\nSHANGHAI HEZHONG - CARRIER AIR - CONDITIONING EQUIPMENT CO., LTD.\n制冷百家网整理：www.zhilengbj.cn",
